case_title: P W FU VS. CAPTAIN IDETA, FIELD SERVICE DIRECTOR

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) SC-100 AND POS-10 BLANK FORMS. PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P W FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON AUG-01-2012 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-01-2012 BY CYNTHIA M. LEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED THROUGH BRIAN CAULEY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE, 1390 MARKET ST. 7TH FLOOR. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED A LETTER TO JUDGE LEE THAT WAS RETAINED BY THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS BY DEFENSE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: D. FEINBERG. NOT REPORTED. (306)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FU, P W IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAPTAIN IDETA, FIELD SERVICE DIRECTOR SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE - COURT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
TO DISMISS FRIVOLOUS PREFILING ORDER FOR UNSUBSTANTIATED ACCUSATION OF VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND NONSENSICAL FEE WAIVER RECONSIDERATIONS IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P W FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY FU, P W AS TO DEFENDANT CAPTAIN IDETA, FIELD SERVICE DIRECTOR SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
